subcodes.title: Words to Latimer, Esslemont, Randall et al, spoken on 1919-11-22
subcodes.first_line: This is childish play. They did these things so that the English would not evacuate.... On the way to Akka the rest of us went ashore at Alexandria
subcodes.subjects: @superiority; incomparability of the Word of God, @multiple meanings; interpretations in scripture, @translation; publication of the Sacred Writings, @banishment to; life in 'Akka, @rejection, opposition and persecution
